text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, this place is the real deal! I'm<n>way out of
my element!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
To explain why we're here, we have<n>to go back
a little bit. It all began when<n>Nishino Flower
approached Tosen<n>Jordan for advice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So, I put a photo of my nails on<n>Umatter, and
someone commented<n>suggesting I make a
nail-themed<n>packed lunch.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought that sounded fun... but I<n>can't come up
with a good idea. I<n>want to make something
stylish—what<n>do you think?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You want it to look glam for<n>the photos,
yeah? How about these? I<n>keep seeing them on
my feed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Japanese sweets! They'd look<n>super cute in
the lunchbox!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I've never made anything so<n>highbrow
before...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... Who said anything about<n>eyebrows?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, if it's about sweets, I<n>know just who
to ask.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Japanese sweets? Then I'd<n>recommend a
workshop for<n>beginners. The experts will guide
you<n>through all the steps.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm rather interested myself, actually.<n>Would it be
all right if I tagged along<n>when you go?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, totes. Can you handle the<n>reservation, then?
You know way<n>more about this stuff and all.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They also figured having a chaperone<n>would be
preferable, which is the<n>exact moment I
happened to pass by...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can sense a solemn adherence to<n>tradition and
ceremony. I think we'll<n>have a great experience
making<n>sweets.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't think I could be more out of<n>place...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's okay, we're in this together!<n>Um... I think
we get to try some tea and<n>sweets before the
workshop begins.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
A private room?! We're not gonna<n>have to be all
prim and proper, are<n>we?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I read a book on Japanese culture<n>once that said
Japanese sweets go<n>hand in hand with formal
tea<n>ceremonies.

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text:
Pardon my intrusion. We will now be<n>preparing
your tea.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A number of kimono-clad staff enter<n>the room.
They place trays of<n>traditional sweets before us
and begin<n>preparing the tea.

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text: Please, help yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? We're already eating?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I think it's proper etiquette to<n>finish the
sweets before the tea.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I read that as well. It was quite<n>surprising.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know your stuff, huh, Flower?<n>Help a girl out
here—I'm in way over<n>my head!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd like your guidance too, if you<n>don't mind. I've
studied tea<n>ceremony, but I'm far from an expert.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course! B-but it's not like I<n>have any
formal practice, so... I'm<n>sorry if I get anything
mixed up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, you're so put together, Flower.<n>Mad
respect, seriously.

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I admire how open-minded you<n>all are.
Many people would find it<n>difficult to ask
someone younger for<n>help.

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I admire how open-minded you<n>all are.
Many people would find it<n>difficult to ask
someone younger for<n>help.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that a low-key<n>compliment?
choice_data_list:
Of course! She's praising your willingness to
learn!

Of course! She's praising your willingness to
learn!

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text:
Do pardon me for speaking out of<n>turn. Please
make yourselves at<n>home. It wouldn't be a
worthy<n>experience if you couldn't relax and<n>
enjoy yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, so, like, are selfies cool?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Psst, Jordan! That has to be against<n>the—

text_block_list.name: Shop Equipe A
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Yes, take as many photos as<n>you'd like.
Nothing makes us happier<n>than others
appreciating Japanese<n>sweets and tea.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: M-me too! I want to take pictures of<n>the sweets!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That workshop was a very enriching<n>experience.
It certainly helped broaden<n>my perspective on
Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For sure. It was cool trying something<n>you
normally don't get to do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I can use my knowledge about<n>making
Japanese sweets to make<n>cute decorations for
my packed<n>lunches!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If you need any tips with your nails,<n>let me know,
yeah? I got you.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The trio chatter excitedly on the way<n>back,
sharing ideas for Nishino<n>Flower's Umatter
photos. There's no<n>doubt they'll turn out great.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All is silent but for the sound of a<n>bamboo tea
whisk. I sneak a<n>sideways glance and see
Tosen<n>Jordan and Eishin Flash looking<n>pained.

text_block_list.name: Jordan & Flash
text_block_list.text: Hnnnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ow, ow, ow! Sitting in seiza sucks! I<n>can't feel
my legs!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Jordan, I'd hazard a guess that it's<n>impolite to
be stretching like that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: C'mon, it's just us here.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Besides, I know you're totes numb<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! P-please don't pokeme!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, try leaving some space between<n>your legs
and crossing your big toes.<n>It helps to avoid
going numb.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, no kidding. That's way better!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So this is how you're supposed to sit.<n>As
someone without much<n>experience, your advice
is a lifesaver.<n>Thank you, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, happy to help. But if it starts to<n>hurt, you
can always just say<n>"excuse me" and sit
normally.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, I'm so glad we've got you<n>here. Like,
marry me, girl!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: C-come on, you'll make me blush!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Flower, if you notice anything wrong<n>with my
etiquette, please let me know.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, I don't think you have to worry<n>about that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The staff have already left, so that's<n>probably
their way of saying we can<n>make ourselves at
home.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What if they're just cutting us some<n>slack after
seeing our horrible<n>posture?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That would be... a littleembarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meh, I say we thank them. Time to<n>kick back and
relax.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Let's enjoy the tea and the<n>sweets at
our own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After we take our time savoring the<n>tea and
sweets, we take part in the<n>sweets-making
workshop. From<n>beginning to end, everyone is all<n>
smiles.
